title: Youtube Poop: Heroes in a Nutshell
description:
Huh.  Deepercutt and Captpan release a Poop of the very same episode of the very same show only a day apart.  STRAAAAAAAAAAANGE, ISN'T IT?!

Most of my older subscribers may remember seeing this on my channel since March 2008.  Well, I actually finished this back in the beginning of July, but I thought it turned out horrible (censor bleeps, bad awkward pauses, an "OVER 9000" joke).  So I trashed it and decided to remake it.  Unfortunately, I had a hard time coming up with good jokes, so I put it off and worked on some other stuff.

So now, here it is.  That darn TMNT Poop that's been plaguing me for months.  I'm not sure if it's one of my best or not, but it does resemble some of my older work.  Oh, and there's no earrape in it as well, so feel free to use headphones or whatever, since you guys are too lazy to buy speakers.

Now if you'll excuse me, I'll get back to work on bigger and better shit.  Like, say, a certain part 2?

In before "U STOLE DEPERCUTS JOKES!!!111 IM  UNSUBBING!!"  Er, I mean...Enjoy! :)


((Note: PLEASE don't compare this to Deepercutt's Poop!  I don't want a stupid rivalry to sprout up.))
